name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Translate on-screen video text into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses producing video content for global audiences face a costly, time-consuming process of recreating graphics and visual text elements for each language. Redoing motion graphics, subtitles, and on-screen text across multiple markets strains creative teams and budgets. Visual Translate automates this by detecting and replacing text within video visuals while preserving the original design.
useCases: Localising marketing video campaigns for international markets without redesigning assets
Translating e-learning course videos for multilingual employee training programmes
Adapting product demo videos for regional sales teams across different languages
Updating social media video content with translated on-screen text for global distribution
